refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and execute worksite tasks to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.
DP2: Task scheduling and dispatch system integrated with teleoperation.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and productivity reporting subsystem.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.

potential_sources: Interaction between control algorithms and task scheduling
Data dependencies between telemetry and control
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically decoupled from task scheduling and telemetry but requires data inputs; interfaces must be well-defined to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate sensor data for control optimization.
Risk that control algorithm complexity may impact real-time responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing telemetry and task scheduling separately to reduce coupling and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and software components responsible for equipment operation and control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends operational data and productivity metrics to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task execution commands from Teleoperation module.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of control algorithms; low diffusion as control logic is centralized.
Lower containment; would require diffusion of control logic across modules.
Not suitable for control algorithm containment; primarily for remote tasking.
No containment; unrelated to control optimization.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Control algorithms for equipment operation optimization are best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and maintain real-time responsiveness.
containment_risks: Potential integration complexity with Teleoperation commands.
Risk of interface mismatches causing delays or errors.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts for Telemetry and Tasking to ensure robust integration.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive control algorithms) logically satisfies the refined FR of optimizing equipment operation to meet productivity targets.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as control logic is centralized in Vehicle module.
Interface complexity with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules needs monitoring.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment scores, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring productivity metrics and monitoring control system performance within the Vehicle module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of control optimization DP to Vehicle IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Consider separate IM assignment for task scheduling and telemetry in subsequent decomposition.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, the FR refinement can be improved by explicitly including task scheduling and telemetry as separate sub-FRs with corresponding DPs and IMs to reduce coupling and improve modularity.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and execute worksite tasks to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time.

revise.why: To explicitly capture all functional aspects contributing to productivity and enable clearer DP and IM mapping.

assumptions: Accurate sensor data is available for control optimization.
Interfaces between modules can be clearly defined and implemented.
open_risks: Integration complexity between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Potential delays or errors due to interface mismatches.
evidence_needed: Performance data from control algorithms in representative operations.
Interface specification documents and integration test results.
